$comment: Read-only enforcement settings for the claude -p REVIEW subprocess ONLY. Applied by the pipeline via --settings <absolute-path-to-this-file> (see src/provider/claude.ts buildClaudeArgs). Deliberately NOT placed at .claude/settings.json so it is never auto-loaded into interactive sessions. The catch-all '*' matcher routes EVERY tool (including unforeseen ones) to the default-deny hook (Layer 2 of the two-layer safety model, D-09).
